value.found_quote:
### Use the CLI (recommended)

If you have the CLI installed, run:

```bash
codex mcp add linear --url https://mcp.linear.app/mcp
```

This prompts you to sign in with your Linear account and connect it to Codex.
value.rationale: The page describes the CLI (recommended) method to add the Linear MCP server via the `codex mcp add linear` command, which prompts the user to sign in with their Linear account, matching the claim.
